summary: Tested all 10 specified flows. Backend: 10/10 tests pass. Critical frontend bug found: Reports page Finished Goods tab crashes with 'data.map is not a function' when switching from tab 0 (RM Stock) to tab 1 (Finished Goods). Root cause: React renders ReportResult with old tab-0 data (object) while tab state is already 1, before async setData(null) fires. All other pages work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Uncaught runtime error: 'data.map is not a function' when switching TO the Finished Goods tab from RM Stock tab. ReportResult renders with tab=1 but data still holds tab-0 object ({total_value, items:[]}). data.map is called on that object causing crash.

issues: HTML hydration warnings: <span> as child of <tbody> / <tr> as child of <span> — these are React Virtual DOM span wrappers inside table rows, cosmetic but generates console errors

action_items: Fix Reports.jsx tab switching: In ReportResult component, for tab===1 guard data with Array.isArray check: `{Array.isArray(data) ? data.map(...) : []}` OR synchronously reset data before tab switch with useEffect cleanup. Root cause is stale data from tab-0 rendering under tab-1 context briefly.
Minor: Fix HTML structure warnings — <span> wrappers inside <tbody> (caused by conditional rendering wrappers in RawMaterials.jsx, Purchase.jsx table bodies)
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.jsx line 186: `data.map(...)` must guard against non-array data. When switching tabs, React re-renders with new tab index but old data state, triggering crash. Fix: `{(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []).map(...)}`
BulkImport modal: The Playwright modal detection failed with standard selectors, but the screenshot confirmed it visually opens correctly — no functional issue, just test selector needs tuning

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Login, Dashboard, Raw Materials Bulk Import modal, BOM Management, Production Orders all pass. Reports Finished Goods tab crashes.

seed_data_creation: BULK001 and BULK002 created via opening-stock-import CSV upload during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs pass. Main bug: Reports.jsx Finished Goods tab (tab index 1) crashes because data.map() is called when data is still the RM Stock response object (non-array) from the previous tab render. Fix in Reports.jsx line 186. Purchase Entry dropdown for raw materials was not testable via playwright because selects are inside a modal (New Purchase button) - not tested in-depth. The 5 raw materials in DB are: RM001, RM002, RM003, BULK001, BULK002.
rca_of_issue: Reports.jsx Finished Goods tab bug: When user clicks tab 1 (Finished Goods), React first re-renders with tab=1 and data=<previous RM Stock data object>. The ReportResult component sees tab===1 and calls data.map() but data is {total_value, items:[]} not an array. setData(null) is called async inside loadReport() after state update, so there's a brief window where tab=1 and data=old-object causing crash. Fix: add Array.isArray guard or call setData(null) synchronously before loadReport.
